{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231821256DA2E45970440EB71C34"}"},"total":2836},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7268795148011717432","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"方个面都很完美，每个历史人物也有了不同的发展，我就喜欢这种带一点点不同的感觉，不要每次主角穿越过去，搞了很多年，结果所有的历史人物还是那个性格不变[害羞]又不会完全去搞怪，把人搞得很那个，各种经典桥段场面也能通过一些别的方式把它复刻出来，我觉得这是我看过最好的三国小说了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692398477,"group_id":"7107799811247574049","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/4qFuar6uoaPSs3JlOmy9cvSBZ96Qw9WsHcFioT5vDF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4259935970407224","user_name":"利亚穆伊加岛的姜语休"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4259935970407224","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7107799811247574049","book_info":{"abstract":"【三国】+【种田文】+【无后宫】
历史系学生李忧穿越到三国，竟然意外与郭嘉结缘。
辅佐刘备，征战四方，看腹黑学生如何在三国之中创造不一样的神话。
诸葛亮“李伯川天纵之才，我不如他。”
曹操“若是早知伯川之才，何至于此。”
郭嘉‘“什么神谋鬼算李伯川，我俩喝完酒没钱时，他跑的估计比赤兔都快。”
刘备“我得伯川，如鱼得水也。”
阿斗“我错了，我真错了，你不要过来呀！！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aa9531b1d32bacf2c3cd204fefb238","author":"墨损文香","author_id":"","book_id":"7107799811247574049","book_name":"三国：我，神谋鬼算李伯川","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7107992393437151784","read_count":"53785","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4504418"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"2200","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,腹黑,单女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/293a3285371e33b0f8fc4e5b901b3929~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445285&x-signature=3E2e3IbdTokljaCiUjvEM5FPAuk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2251394572103988","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.8037593e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231821256DA2E45970440EB71C34"}"},"relate_info_lis
